title: Help & Support
description: Find answers to frequently asked questions or contact us for further assistance.

whatIsSicerdas.question: What is SiCerdas?
whatIsSicerdas.answer: SiCerdas is a digital education platform providing access to thousands of books, quizzes, and other learning resources for students across Indonesia.

howToRegister.question: How do I register for an account?
howToRegister.answer: You can register for an account by clicking the 'Register' button in the top right corner of the page, then completing the registration form with the required information.

isThereCost.question: Is it free to use this platform?
isThereCost.answer: SiCerdas offers both free and paid plans. Free plans provide basic access to most content, while paid plans provide full access to all features and premium content.

offlineAccess.question: Can I access content offline?
offlineAccess.answer: Yes, with our Android app, you can download books and materials to access them offline anytime.

supportContact.question: How do I contact support?
supportContact.answer: You can contact our support team via email at support@sicerdas.com or through the contact form on the Support page.
